source: Cannot delete tag — {0} entries use it.
translation: Ezin da etiketa ezabatu — {0} sarrerak erabiltzen dute.

source: Do you want to sync all unsynced time entries to ERPNext now?
translation: Sinkronizatu gabeko denbora-sarrera guztiak ERPNext-era sinkronizatu nahi dituzu orain?

source: Entries older than {0} days are locked. Contact your administrator.
translation: {0} egun baino zaharragoak diren sarrerak blokeatuta daude. Jarri harremanetan administratzailearekin.

source: ERPNext is not installed on this site.
translation: ERPNext ez dago gune honetan instalatuta.

source: ERPNext is reachable and Timesheet access is confirmed.
translation: ERPNext eskuragarri dago eta ordu-orrirako sarbidea berretsita dago.

source: ERPNext Timesheet {0} for {1} is submitted — re-sync blocked.
translation: ERPNext ordu-orria {0} {1}-(e)rako bidalita dago — birsinkronizazioa blokeatua.

source: ERPNext Timesheet is submitted — re-sync blocked
translation: ERPNext ordu-orria bidalita dago — birsinkronizazioa blokeatua

source: Download all your time entries as CSV.
translation: Deskargatu zure denbora-sarrera guztiak CSV gisa.

source: Warning: This entry is more than 7 days old.
translation: Kontuz: Sarrera hau 7 egun baino zaharragoa da.

source: Press H or Esc to close

translation: Saio guztiak burutu dira. Lan bikaina!

source: Work in focused sessions with timed breaks.
translation: Lan egin saio fokuatuetan tenporizatutako atsedenarekin.
